summary: Implement a new 'Item Page' to display a list of products using shadcn/ui components. This involves creating a new React component `ItemPage.tsx` and integrating it into the application's routing.

steps.description: Create the `ItemPage.tsx` component. This component will define a `Product` interface, include mock product data, and render each product using shadcn/ui `Card` components. Each card will display product details like name, description, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button. `ScrollArea` will be used to manage product listing if there are many items.
steps.details: Create a new file `client/src/pages/ItemPage.tsx`. The component will use `Card`, `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`, `CardDescription`, `CardContent`, `CardFooter`, `Button`, `Label`, `Separator`, and `ScrollArea` from shadcn/ui, along with `ShoppingCart` icon from `lucide-react`. Dummy product data will be hardcoded for demonstration.

steps.description: Integrate the `ItemPage` component into the application's routing. This typically involves modifying `App.tsx` (or a similar main routing file) to add a new route that points to the `ItemPage` component.
steps.details: Add a new route for `/item` in `client/src/App.tsx` (assuming `App.tsx` handles main application routing). This route will render the `ItemPage` component when accessed. Ensure `ItemPage` is imported correctly using the alias `@/pages/ItemPage.tsx`.

steps.description: Verify the new item page is accessible and displays products correctly. This involves navigating to the new route in the browser and checking the UI.
steps.details: Start the development server. Navigate to `/item` in the browser. Confirm that the `ItemPage` loads, displays the mock product cards, and that the shadcn/ui components are rendered as expected. Check for any console errors.

risks: Incorrect routing configuration in `App.tsx` could prevent the page from loading.
Styling conflicts with existing global styles or other components.
The assumption that `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`, etc., are available as named exports from `card.tsx` might be incorrect if the shadcn/ui setup is highly customized or older.
rollback_strategy: Revert the changes made to `client/src/App.tsx` by removing the new route. Delete the `client/src/pages/ItemPage.tsx` file. This will restore the application to its previous state.
success_criteria: The `/item` route successfully loads the `ItemPage` component. The page displays a grid of product cards, each showing a product image, name, description, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button. All shadcn/ui components are rendered without visual errors or console warnings.
original_request: create a item page showing the products.
